name: inventory-assessment
description: 3-Tier full-stack developer assessment: auth, inventory, order fulfillment, shipping engine

scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.setup: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
